innateAbility.name: Tailwind
innateAbility.description: Grants self bonus movement speed upon ability casts.The bonus movement speed value decays linearly after a fixed duration.

abilities.name: Shackleshot
abilities.description: Shackles the targeted-unit to another enemy unit or tree in a line directly behind it.

abilities.name: Powershot
abilities.description: Charges her bow up briefly for a single powerful shot. The longer the charge, the potent the arrow fired.The arrow damages and slows all enemy units along its path. Reduces damage by a factor per enemy unit hit.

abilities.name: Windrun
abilities.description: Grants self movement speed bonus and absolute evasion, evading all incoming physical attacks.

abilities.name: Gale Force
abilities.description: Summons a strong wind that pulls all enemies in the area-targeted location toward the vector-targeted direction.

abilities.name: Focus Fire
abilities.description: Grants self a massive attack speed bonus against a single enemy unit or enemy building, while sacrificing a portion of her own attack damage.Does not reduce the potency of attack modifier sources or on-hit effects.
